title: Consumability
description: Adds Eating Animations for Food & Consumables using Vanilla functionalities, no mods required!
body:
# 🍎 Consumability This Resource Pack adds **Animated Food and Consumables** textures 🍖! **All made in Vanilla Minecraft**, **no Mods** are required for the pack to work ⚙️! ### Showcase :
List of compatible Food and Consumables :
  • Apple
  • Beetroot
  • Beetroot Soup
  • Bread
  • Carrot
  • Chorus Fruit
  • Cooked Chicken
  • Cooked Cod
  • Cooked Mutton
  • Cooked Porkchop
  • Cooked Rabbit
  • Cooked Salmon
  • Cookie
  • Dried Kelp
  • Enchanted Golden Apple
  • Golden Apple
  • Glow Berries
  • Golden Carrot
  • Honey Bottle
  • Melon Slice
  • Milk Bucket
  • Mushroom Stew
  • Ominous Bottle
  • Poisonous Potato
  • Potato
  • Potions
  • Pufferfish
  • Pumpkin Pie
  • Rabbit Stew
  • Raw Beef
  • Raw Chicken
  • Raw Cod
  • Raw Mutton
  • Raw Porkchop
  • Raw Rabbit
  • Raw Salmon
  • Rotten Flesh
  • Spider Eye
  • Steak
  • Suspicious Stew
  • Sweet Berries
  • Tropical Fish
### Credits, Inspirations, Info : - [**Eating Animation Mod** by theoness1](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) - [**Eating Animation Pack (Resource Pack Version)** by theoness1](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/theones-eating-animation-pack) - [**Tasty Items** by enchanted-games](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tasty-items) - [**Blockbench** for Custom Item Models' properties editing](https://www.blockbench.net/) - [**Minecraft Wiki** for information, data, examples and sources (both code and textures)](https://minecraft.wiki) - [**PhoenixSC's** 24w45a Snapshot Showcase](https://youtu.be/Pltq7JRw2ws?si=fDNvgyGG-8zHW4uW) - [**Slicedlime's** Snapshot Showcase](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL4ZS2guXqa_jBtLMmufaGvE7SkTHOstCy) These Projects/Creations/People are very cool, please go **show them some love** too! ❤️ ### Installation guide : You install this Pack like you would normally do with other Resource Packs, just a simple **drag** and **drop**, easy! Or you could use the **Modrinth App**/**PrismLauncher**/**MultiMC**'s built-in installer!
FAQs :
Q : Do you need mods like Indium, CIT Resewn, Continuity etc. for this pack?
  • A : You do not need any mods in order for this resource pack to work normally.
Q : Will you backport this mod to Version X.X.X?
  • A : No, I won't be able to backport this pack to Versions older than Snapshot 24w45a, simply because it is impossible, and you have an alternative for older versions (Eating Animation Mod).
Q : Will this work with other resource packs?
  • A : As long as they don't replace the textures that I change, then yes it will.
Q : Can I use this for a Showcase/Youtube video, or use it in my Modpacks?
  • You can use this Resource Pack to do a showcase/Youtube video or use it in your Modpacks, just make sure to give the proper credits!

**Support me Directly!** :
